startPoint.en: Talk to King Roald in the Varrock Palace Throne room.
startPoint.es: Habla con King Roald en la sala del trono del Varrock Palace.

items.name: Firemaking
items.display: 45 logs of any kind that you have the Firemaking level to use, in 2 sets of 20 and 1 set of 5. The sets have to be of the same kind for the quest.

children.name: Logs
children.display: Regular logs are enough for the quest, which can be cut from nearby trees.

children.name: Acadia logs
children.display: Some logs like acadia logs, corrupted magic logs, and eternal magic logs will not properly work.

children.name: All Fired Up (minigame)
children.display: You may refer to All Fired Up (minigame)#Lighting the beacons.

recommended.name: Invitation box
recommended.display: Invitation box for quick transportation, if available.

children.name: Skeletal horror Teleport
children.display: Alternatively, the Skeletal horror Teleport, Fort Forinthry lodestone, or Fort Forinthry Teleport scrolls may be used.

recommended.name: Hatchets
recommended.display: Bring the items above in the form of the first 20 logs, a hatchet for cutting the other 20 logs from the normal trees between the beacons, and 5 logs of any type to relight the first beacon, along with the required tinderbox.

recommended.name: Seer's headband
recommended.display: Equipping any tier of Seer's headband can speed this already short quest up considerably.

recommended.name: Weight-reducing clothing
recommended.display: Weight-reducing clothing can help since carrying the logs will slow you down. Additionally, any tier of Explorer's ring can help recharge run energy.

recommended.name: Salt-water spring
recommended.display: You can also use the salt-water spring in Oo'glog or the Anachronia base camp for a temporary and unlimited run energy boost

rewards.name: All Fired Up (minigame)
rewards.display: Access to the All Fired Up minigame

postQuest.name: Ring of fire
postQuest.display: The ring of fire for lighting 6 beacons

postQuest.name: Flame gloves
postQuest.display: The flame gloves for lighting 10 beacons

postQuest.name: Inferno adze
postQuest.display: The Inferno adze for lighting all 14 beacons

text.en: Talk to King Roald in Varrock Palace.
text.es: Habla con King Roald en Varrock Palace.

text.en: Talk to Blaze Sharpeye in Silvarea which is north-east of the Varrock Dig Site and south-west of the Paterdomus Temple on the River Salve.
text.es: Habla con Blaze Sharpeye en Silvarea, que está al noreste del Varrock Dig Site y al suroeste del Paterdomus Temple, junto al River Salve.

chatOptions: 1 Does it matter what type of log I use?

text.en: two sets of 20 unnoted logs (each set must be all the same type of log)
Add-logs to the unlit beacon next to Blaze (requires 20 logs).
text.es: Añade troncos (add-logs) a la almenara apagada junto a Blaze (requiere 20 troncos).
Vuelve a hablar con Blaze Sharpeye.

text.en: Acquire 20 more logs by chopping or banking.
text.es: Consigue 20 troncos más talando árboles o retirándolos del banco.

text.en: Go north-west to the beacon near the Odd Old Man, add 20 logs and then light it.
text.es: Ve al noroeste hasta la almenara cercana al Odd Old Man, añade 20 troncos y luego enciéndela.

text.en: 5 unnoted logs of the same type
Go back and talk to Blaze again.
text.es: Vuelve y habla de nuevo con Blaze.
Añade troncos (add-logs) a la almenara (requiere 5 troncos).
